name: HMS Northcoates (FY 548)
events: 22 Feb 1943 HMS Trespasser (Lt. R.M. Favell, RN) conducted RDF trials off Plymouth with HNoMS Eskdale (Lt.Cdr. S.V. Storheill, RNorN), HMS Northcotes (T/Lt. A.G. Hallows, RNVR) and motor launches. (1)
28 Sep 1943 Around 2210 A/28, HMS Unison (Lt. T.E. Barlow, RN) arrived at Plymouth.
She had arrived at the rendezvous position ('YY', 180° - Lizard - 10 miles) with her escort at 1300 A/28 but the escort was not there.
At 1420 A/28, the escort, HMS Northcotes (T/Lt. A.G. Hallows, RNVR), arrived and they proceeded in company to Plymouth. (2)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
